programmes.show_description: The Babies In The Thames. A case delving into the exploitative world of baby-farming reveals a terrifying psychopath hiding behind the mask of a caring adoptive mother. S1, Ep3
The Missing Cameras. When a mother-of-two disappears, investigators turn to CCTV for clues to help them find her. They make a grisly discovery on a remote ranch in Texas. S10, Ep7
The Girl In The Silver Truck. When Laura Pietscher turns up dead in a dumpster in Tampa, detectives turn to CCTV footage to trace her fatal journey and identify her murderer. S10, Ep8
Teleshopping.

False Witness. How advances in technology can expose a murderous liar, such as the man who staged his wife's suicide to cash in a $100,000 life insurance policy. S5, Ep1
Missing. Investigating America's 1.8 million missing people; some of whom are runaways who find their way home, whilst others simply disappear. S5, Ep3
Lawless. When police officers respond to a domestic disturbance, a fleeing suspect fires at them. Fingerprints and an FBI investigation lead to the criminal. S5, Ep7
The Initiation. When a record store clerk is shot and killed outside a bank, surprising clues left at the scene indicate that robbery was not the motive. S5, Ep10
Ben Butler & Jennie Gray. In a rage, Ben Butler killed his young daughter, Ellie, but along with his wife faked a 999 call and protested innocence. Experts analyse their interviews. S3, Ep7
Brutal Abduction. Re-examines the 1996 investigation into the abduction of a 17-year-old boy from a shop near his home, followed by ransom demands for $30,000. S6, Ep3
Radical Agenda. New Jersey state trooper Phillip Lamanco is shot dead on duty. Detectives try to find his killers. Is there a link to a terrorist future plot? S6, Ep4
The Killing Zone. The violent activities of gang members from the 'K Street Crew' are investigated by the Safe Streets Task Force. S6, Ep5
Our Secret Identity. Pam Jacobs reveals the dark truth about her father. Growing up, she never realised he was a fugitive suspected of the murders of various coin shop owners. S4, Ep16
He Almost Got Away With It. Timothy Bass got away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, he was working the night shift. She believed him until she uncovered his secret. S5, Ep9
My Son Broke My Heart. A woman must face the hellish truth about her troublemaking son when he commits a monstrous crime. How much can a mother's love for her son withstand? S5, Ep18
He Looks Like The Killer On TV. When a friend tells Margie Bult to turn on the TV, she sees a fugitive named Paul Steven Mack who resembles her husband and vows to uncover the truth. S8, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programmes.show_description: I May Be Cold-Blooded. A man's mother and brother want him to answer questions after he shoots and kills his loving grandmother in cold blood. S2, Ep7
He Tied Me Up, Too. When James Bergstrom's wife, Linda, begins to suspect that his bondage fetish is morphing into something sinister, she can't get anyone to believe her. S7, Ep9
Williams. The disappearance of Denise Williams' husband leaves her devastated. But, when his mother investigates, she discovers the heart-wrenching truth of his demise. S4, Ep4
Badge Of Evil. Tony believes his mother found happiness with Deputy Dave Rogers, until he sees the dark truth a man who uses his badge to terrorize and abuse. S10, Ep15
A Deadly Obsession. Alice Ruggles meets soldier Trimaan Dhillon on Facebook. Experts analyse Dhillon's terrifying behaviour after Alice is found dead. S6, Ep2
The Bermondsey Horror. A body is found under a kitchen floor, and the homeowners are on the run. After their arrest they have different stories about how the victim died. S1, Ep4
The Lambeth Serial Killer. Two young women are poisoned by a mysterious man called Fred. Can the police track down this man in time to stop him killing again? S1, Ep5
The Dog Knows. When 37-year-old Merrilee Cox-Lafferty disappears in Utah, police turn to CCTV to track her down. Then her car turns up 300 miles away in Idaho. S10, Ep9
She's Fake. In Fernandina Beach, Florida, cosmetologist Joleen Cummings goes missing after an appointment. CCTV footage reveals an unlikely suspect. S10, Ep10

Material Witness. A victim's estranged spouse is often a key witness in a murder investigation, and when the body is found, family and friends can provide crucial information. S7, Ep89
Betrayed. Sometimes, when a death seems to be accidental, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal hidden betrayals that reclassify cases from accidents to homicides. S7, Ep90
Hidden Agenda. The FBI is hot on the trail of bank robbers who leave behind bombs after their crime, but there's more to their cause than meets the eye. S4, Ep2
Vanished. When the wife of a wealthy man vanished, an unusual ransom note provided clues to the captor - who turned out to be involved in one of his companies. S4, Ep5
Joanna Yeates. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of 25-year-old Joanna Yeates, who was found strangled to death on Christmas Day in 2010. S1, Ep3
Murder Is No Accident. A vivacious 33-year-old drowns in the middle of a crowded lake. The investigation untangles a dark, nefarious past that includes theft and multiple murders. S2, Ep2
A Fateful Meeting. When Amy disappears, police have a suspect but no crime scene, no body and no evidence. It takes an unexpected informant to blow the case wide open. S1, Ep11
The Vanishing Babysitter. 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her home, but police find a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction. S2, Ep10
Mark Fellows. In summer 2014, a drink thrown in a Manchester nightclub triggered a gangland feud that caused years of ruthless violence, with deadly consequences. S1, Ep7
A Mother's Work. When Lanny Horwitz is found murdered in his own home, it unleashes a shocking tale of jealousy and infidelity, leaving every member of the family a suspect. S3, Ep5
Into The Swamp. When Terry Thrift vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years. S3, Ep8
Smokescreen. Detectives in Waynesfield, Ohio, discover the body of Erin Mulcahy in her shower. Can the police catch those responsible for the town's first murder in 50 years? S4, Ep20
320k Con And Zoe Dronfield. Judge Rinder examines the real-life case of Debbie Davey, who fell victim to an elaborate scam orchestrated by a very close friend. S1, Ep4
The Vanishing Babysitter. 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her home, but police find a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction. S2, Ep10
Grenada: The Body In The Suitcase. In 2009, young mother Nixiann Downes-Clack went missing from her island home in Grenada. Her family speak about the desperate search to find her. S1, Ep7
Joshua Davies. 16-year-old Joshua Davies was sentenced to 14 years in jail for the murder of his on-off girlfriend. Why did he kill - and only confess to it in prison? S1, Ep5
Mansion Murder Cam. In Florida, two loving parents are brutally gunned down. The police must rely on surveillance cameras to catch the killers and bring them to justice. S1, Ep1
